steps.title: Identify the temporal opposition
steps.content: The passage contrasts post-consumer waste (the magazine) with pre-consumer waste (the scraps)—opposite points on a timeline.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content: ”By contrast” marks this opposition directly. The other three suggest causation (“As a result”), exemplification (“For example”), or elaboration (“Specifically”), not opposition. That matches choice A — A is correct.
